alkylation reagent: alkylation was performed by using 100 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation was performed by using 100 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: Lys-C and Trypsin in 25 mM ABC buffer were added sequentially to digest the proteins
fragmentation method: collision-induced dissociation and higher energy collisional dissociation
Both collision-induced dissociation and higher energy collisional dissociation were utilized to perform the fragmentation
instrument: For ultrahigh-performance liquid chromatography (UPLC, Waters)-MS (Orbitrap Elite, Thermo)
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in positive electrospray ion mode
reduction reagent: Reduction was performed by using 50 mM dithiothreitol in 25 mM ABC buffer
reduction concentration: Reduction was performed by using 50 mM dithiothreitol in 25 mM ABC buffer
